tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set cur int (string_length s))
(if (lt cur n)
  (set pad int (sub n cur))
  (for i 0 pad
    (set s (string_concat s " "))))
(println s)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set target #1)
(set l (len s))
(if (ge l target)
  (println s)
  (else
    (set pad "")
    (for i 0 (sub target l)
      (set pad (add pad " ")))
    (println (add s pad))))

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set cur int (string_length s))
(set total_pad int 0)
(if (lt cur n)
  (set total_pad int (sub n cur)))
(set left_pad int (div total_pad 2))
(set right_pad int (sub total_pad left_pad))
(set result string "")
(for i 0 left_pad
  (set result (string_concat result " ")))
(set result (string_concat result s))
(for i 0 right_pad
  (set result (string_concat result " ")))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set n #1)
(set l (len s))
(if (ge l n)
  (println s)
  (else
    (set total_pad (sub n l))
    (set left_pad (div total_pad 2))
    (set right_pad (sub total_pad left_pad))
    (set lp "")
    (for i 0 left_pad
      (set lp (add lp " ")))
    (set rp "")
    (for i 0 right_pad
      (set rp (add rp " ")))
    (println (add lp (add s rp)))))

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set cur int (string_length s))
(if (gt cur n)
  (println (string_concat (string_slice s 0 (sub n 3)) "..."))
  (else
    (println s)))
tasks.b_code:
(set s $0)
(set n #1)
(if (gt (len s) n)
  (println (add (string_slice s 0 (sub n 3)) "..."))
  (else (println s)))

tasks.a_code:
(set sentence string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set words array (string_split sentence " "))
(set num_words int (array_length words))
(set current_line string "")
(for i 0 num_words
  (set word string (array_get words i))
  (if (eq current_line "")
    (set current_line word)
    (else
      (set candidate string (string_concat (string_concat current_line " ") word))
      (if (le (string_length candidate) n)
        (set current_line candidate)
        (else
          (println current_line)
          (set current_line word))))))
(if (ne current_line "")
  (println current_line))
tasks.b_code:
(set words (split $0 " "))
(set n #1)
(set line "")
(for-each word words
  (cond
    ((eq (len line) 0)
     (set line word))
    ((le (add (add (len line) 1) (len word)) n)
     (set line (fmt "{} {}" line word)))
    (true
     (println line)
     (set line word))))
(if (gt (len line) 0)
  (println line))

tasks.a_code:
(set text string $0)
(set n int #1)
(set lines array (string_split text "\n"))
(set indent string "")
(for i 0 n
  (set indent (string_concat indent " ")))
(set num_lines int (array_length lines))
(for i 0 num_lines
  (println (string_concat indent (array_get lines i))))
tasks.b_code:
(set lines (split $0 "\n"))
(set indent "")
(for i 0 #1
  (set indent (add indent " ")))
(for-each line lines
  (println (add indent line)))

tasks.a_code:
(set sentence string $0)
(set words array (string_split sentence " "))
(set num_words int (array_length words))
(set result array [])
(for i 0 num_words
  (set word string (array_get words i))
  (set wlen int (string_length word))
  (if (eq wlen 0)
    (set capitalized string "")
    (else
      (set first string (string_to_upper (string_slice word 0 1)))
      (set rest string (string_to_lower (string_slice word 1 (sub wlen 1))))
      (set capitalized string (string_concat first rest))))
  (set result (array_push result capitalized)))
(println (string_join result " "))
tasks.b_code:
(set words (split $0 " "))
(set result [])
(for-each word words
  (set titled (add (upper (string_slice word 0 1)) (lower (string_slice word 1 (sub (len word) 1)))))
  (push result titled))
(println (join result " "))

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set chars array (string_chars s))
(set result string "")
(set n int (array_length chars))
(for i 0 n
  (set c string (array_get chars i))
  (if (is_upper c)
    (set result (string_concat result (string_concat "-" (string_to_lower c))))
    (else
      (set result (string_concat result c)))))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set result "")
(for-each c (chars $0)
  (if (is_upper c)
    (set result (add result (add "-" (lower c))))
    (else (set result (add result c)))))
(println result)

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set parts array (string_split s "_"))
(set num_parts int (array_length parts))
(set result string "")
(for i 0 num_parts
  (set part string (array_get parts i))
  (set plen int (string_length part))
  (if (gt plen 0)
    (set first string (string_to_upper (string_slice part 0 1)))
    (set rest string (string_to_lower (string_slice part 1 (sub plen 1))))
    (set result (string_concat result (string_concat first rest)))))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set parts (split $0 "_"))
(set result "")
(for-each part parts
  (set result (add result (add (upper (string_slice part 0 1)) (string_slice part 1 (sub (len part) 1))))))
(println result)

tasks.a_code:
(set s string $0)
(set chars array (string_chars s))
(set n int (array_length chars))
(set result string "")
(for i 0 n
  (set c string (array_get chars i))
  (set code int (string_get c 0))
  (set r1 bool (and (ge code 33) (le code 47)))
  (set r2 bool (and (ge code 58) (le code 64)))
  (set r3 bool (and (ge code 91) (le code 96)))
  (set r4 bool (and (ge code 123) (le code 126)))
  (set is_punct bool (or (or (or r1 r2) r3) r4))
  (if (not is_punct)
    (set result (string_concat result c))))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:
(set punct "!\"#$%&'()*+,-./:;<=>?@[\]^_`{|}~")
(set result "")
(for-each c (chars $0)
  (if (not (in c punct))
    (set result (add result c))))
(println result)

tasks.b_code: (println (len $0))

tasks.a_code:
(set n int #0)
(set is_prime bool true)
(if (lt n 2)
  (set is_prime false)
  (else
    (set limit int (add (floor (sqrt (cast_int_float n))) 1))
    (for i 2 limit
      (if (eq (mod n i) 0)
        (set is_prime false)
        (break)))))
(if is_prime
  (println "yes")
  (else
    (println "no")))
tasks.b_code:
(set n #0)
(if (lt n 2)
  (println "no")
  (else
    (set prime true)
    (set i 2)
    (while (le (mul i i) n)
      (if (eq (mod n i) 0)
        (set prime false))
      (set i (add i 1)))
    (if prime (println "yes") (else (println "no")))))

tasks.a_code:
(set a int #0)
(set b int #1)
(while (ne b 0)
  (set t int b)
  (set b (mod a b))
  (set a t))
(println a)
tasks.b_code:
(fn gcd a int b int -> int
  (if (eq b 0) (ret a))
  (ret (gcd b (mod a b))))

(println (gcd #0 #1))

tasks.a_code:

(set b int #1)
(set orig_a int a)
(set orig_b int b)
(while (ne b 0)
  (set t int b)
  (set b (mod a b))
  (set a t))
(println (div (mul orig_a orig_b) a))
tasks.b_code:
(fn gcd a int b int -> int
  (if (eq b 0) (ret a))
  (ret (gcd b (mod a b))))

(println (div (mul #0 #1) (gcd #0 #1)))

tasks.a_code:
(set n int #0)
(if (eq (bit_and n (sub n 1)) 0)
  (println "yes")
  (else
    (println "no")))
tasks.b_code:
(set n #0)
(while (and (gt n 1) (eq (mod n 2) 0))
  (set n (div n 2)))
(if (eq n 1) (println "yes") (else (println "no")))

  (set result (div result (add i 1))))
(println result)
tasks.b_code:

(for i 0 k
  (set result (div (mul result (sub n i)) (add i 1))))
